question_text:
In commit a0f7cba on 2026-07-07, you wrote line 13 of gradebook/analytics.py:
13:     if score >= 90:

Consider changing `score >= 90` to `score > 90`.

After changing the first condition from `score >= 90` to `score > 90`, what observable grade assignment changes at the documented lower boundary of the A range, and why?
